scripts.build: doppler run --no-cache -- pnpm exec vite build
scripts.test:e2e: doppler run --no-cache -- sh -c 'export EVENTS_BASE_URL="${EVENTS_BASE_URL:-https://events-preview-1.iterate.com}"; export AGENTS_E2E_ITERATE_AGENT="${AGENTS_E2E_ITERATE_AGENT:-1}"; pnpm exec vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts'
scripts.test:e2e:iterate-agent: doppler run --no-cache -- env AGENTS_E2E_ITERATE_AGENT=1 pnpm exec vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts e2e/vitest/iterate-agent.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:agent-loop: doppler run --no-cache -- sh -c 'export EVENTS_BASE_URL="${EVENTS_BASE_URL:-https://events-preview-1.iterate.com}"; export AGENTS_E2E_ITERATE_AGENT=1; pnpm exec vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts e2e/vitest/iterate-agent-agent-loop.e2e.test.ts'
scripts.test:e2e:record-har: doppler run --no-cache -- env AGENTS_E2E_RECORD_HAR=1 AGENTS_E2E_ITERATE_AGENT=1 pnpm exec vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts e2e/vitest/iterate-agent.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:record-har-mcp: doppler run --no-cache -- env AGENTS_E2E_RECORD_HAR=1 AGENTS_E2E_ITERATE_AGENT=1 pnpm exec vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts e2e/vitest/iterate-agent-mcp.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:record-har-mixed: doppler run --no-cache -- env AGENTS_E2E_RECORD_HAR=1 AGENTS_E2E_ITERATE_AGENT=1 pnpm exec vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts e2e/vitest/iterate-agent-mixed-codemode.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:runtime-smoke: doppler run --no-cache -- sh -c 'if [ -z "$AGENTS_BASE_URL" ]; then echo "AGENTS_BASE_URL is required"; exit 1; fi; export AGENTS_E2E_RUNTIME_SMOKE=1; pnpm exec vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts e2e/vitest/runtime-smoke.e2e.test.ts'
scripts.test:e2e:preview: doppler run --no-cache -- sh -c 'if [ -z "$AGENTS_BASE_URL" ]; then echo "AGENTS_BASE_URL is required for agents e2e tests"; exit 1; fi; vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts e2e/vitest/runtime-smoke.e2e.test.ts'
